rationale: Statistics & Data Science at L3 has to navigate the borderlands with CS&AI carefully — anywhere statistics meets ML, I let the methodology stay here if the framing is inferential and route to CS if the framing is predictive. Causal Inference gets four leaves because the field has structured itself by method family (potential outcomes, DAGs, IV, sensitivity). Bayesian methods get four leaves because the community spans theory, computation, applied, and probabilistic programming.

subfields.name: High-Dimensional Theory
subfields.tagline: Minimax theory in high-dim, sparsity, restricted eigenvalue conditions.

subfields.name: Nonparametric & Semiparametric Theory
subfields.tagline: Nonparametric estimation theory, semiparametric efficiency.

subfields.name: Statistical Learning Theory
subfields.tagline: Generalization bounds, PAC theory, stability theory.

subfields.name: Regression & GLM Practice
subfields.tagline: Modern regression, GLMs, GAMs, robust regression methodology.

subfields.name: Mixed & Multilevel Models
subfields.tagline: Hierarchical/multilevel models for nested data, longitudinal mixed models.

subfields.name: Survey Sampling & Inference Methodology
subfields.tagline: Survey weights, complex survey designs, sample-survey inference.

subfields.name: Design of Experiments
subfields.tagline: DoE methodology, factorial designs, response surface, optimal design.

subfields.name: Potential Outcomes & ATE Estimation
subfields.tagline: Potential outcomes framework, propensity scores, doubly robust, AIPW.

subfields.name: DAGs & Graphical Causal Models
subfields.tagline: Causal DAGs, structural causal models, identification via d-separation.

subfields.name: IV, RDD & Natural Experiments
subfields.tagline: Instrumental variables, regression discontinuity, difference-in-differences methods.

subfields.name: Causal ML & Targeted Learning
subfields.tagline: Double/debiased ML, targeted learning (TMLE), causal forests, heterogeneous TE.

subfields.name: Hierarchical Bayesian Models
subfields.tagline: Bayesian hierarchical models, partial pooling, shrinkage estimation.

subfields.name: MCMC & HMC Sampling Methodology
subfields.tagline: MCMC theory and practice, HMC, NUTS, adaptive MCMC.

subfields.name: Variational & Approximate Inference
subfields.tagline: VI methodology, normalizing flows for inference, Bayesian neural nets.

subfields.name: Probabilistic Programming
subfields.tagline: Stan/PyMC/Pyro methodology, language design, automated inference research.

subfields.name: Time Series Forecasting Methodology
subfields.tagline: ARIMA, state-space, neural forecasting, M-series competitions.

subfields.name: State-Space & Filtering Methods
subfields.tagline: Kalman/particle filters, hidden Markov models, dynamic factor models.

subfields.name: Spatial & Spatiotemporal Statistics
subfields.tagline: Gaussian processes for spatial data, spatiotemporal kriging, INLA.

subfields.name: Point Processes
subfields.tagline: Poisson and Hawkes processes, marked point processes, log-Gaussian Cox.

subfields.name: Kernel Methods & Gaussian Processes (Stats)
subfields.tagline: Kernel methods, Gaussian processes, RKHS theory.

subfields.name: Tree Ensembles & Boosting Methodology
subfields.tagline: Random forests, gradient boosting, XGBoost-LightGBM methodology.

subfields.name: Conformal Prediction & Distribution-Free UQ
subfields.tagline: Conformal prediction, distribution-free coverage, prediction intervals.

subfields.name: Regularization & Model Selection
subfields.tagline: Lasso theory and practice, model selection, cross-validation methodology.

subfields.name: Sparse Regression & Lasso
subfields.tagline: Lasso methodology, group lasso, sparse plus low-rank, debiased lasso.

subfields.name: Low-Rank & Matrix Completion
subfields.tagline: Matrix completion, low-rank recovery, robust PCA, tensor methods.

subfields.name: Factor Models & PCA Methodology
subfields.tagline: Factor models, sparse PCA, high-dim PCA theory.

subfields.name: A/B Testing & Sequential Experiments
subfields.tagline: A/B testing methodology, multi-armed bandits, sequential testing methodology.

subfields.name: Platform & Adaptive Trial Methodology
subfields.tagline: Platform trials, adaptive designs, Bayesian sequential trials.

subfields.name: Reproducibility & Meta-Research Methodology
subfields.tagline: Reproducibility methods, meta-analysis methodology, registered reports stats.

subfields.name: Statistical Software & Workflows
subfields.tagline: R/Python packages methodology, reproducible workflows, computational stats software.

subfields.name: GWAS Methodology
subfields.tagline: GWAS methodology, fine-mapping, colocalization, PRS methodology.

subfields.name: Single-Cell & Multi-Omics Statistical Methods
subfields.tagline: scRNA-seq stat methods, batch effects, multi-omics integration methodology.

subfields.name: Statistical Signal Processing
subfields.tagline: Detection/estimation, time-frequency, sensor arrays — Kalman/particle filters, spectral estimation, sparse recovery.

subfields.name: Statistical Imaging & Inverse Problems
subfields.tagline: CT/MRI reconstruction, deconvolution, super-resolution, UQ — Bayesian reconstruction, deep priors.

subfields.name: Privacy-Preserving Statistics
subfields.tagline: Differential privacy, synthetic data, secure multi-party computation, federated analyses.

subfields.name: Algorithmic Fairness & Responsible Inference
subfields.tagline: Fairness metrics, causal fairness, audit studies, bias detection, fairness-accuracy trade-offs.

uncovered_concerns: Statistical Image & Signal Processing L2 has no L3 leaves — its papers fold under low-rank methods or kernel methods depending on framing.
Statistical Ethics, Privacy & Fairness L2 has no L3 leaves — DP and fairness methodology fold here under high-dim or ML-causal depending on angle.
